case_title: MACLELLAN, KELLY et al VS RENNA, MARI

docket_entries.description: CORRESPONDENCE FROM DEFT MARI RENNA, RETURNED WITH FORM SC 45 - JUDGEMNT DEBTOR'S REQUEST TO ENTER SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT.
CORRESPONDENCE FROM PLTFS AS ADDITIONAL SUPPORT TO CLAIM, SUBMITTED FOR COMMISSIONER ROSEN-PARK.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MACLELLAN, KELLY SANTOS, JACKIE SHONG, OMIE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RENNA, MARI $2,389.80 PRINCIPAL, $62.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,451.80 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
DEBTOR'S REQUEST FOR SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT GRANTED AS TO DEFENDANT RENNA, MARI
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY MACLELLAN, KELLY SANTOS, JACKIE SHONG, OMIE AS TO DEFENDANT RENNA, MARI ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-15-2005 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DEBTOR'S REQUEST FOR SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT RENNA, MARI
DEFENDANT'S REQUEST FOR SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT WAS SENT TO THE COMMISSIONER FOR REVIEW AND SIGNATURE.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT RENNA, MARI
COPY OF THE SATIS OF JUDGMENT SENT TO DEFT.
